_note: WordPress Core Trac tickets manually tracked. Trac is behind a hashcash anti-bot wall, so we can't auto-fetch. Add new tickets here when filed. status: new | accepted | reopened | reviewing | closed. resolution: only set when status=closed; 'fixed' counts as a Sprinkle Merged win.

tickets.title: Expose admin design tokens (radius, spacing, grayscale, typography) as CSS custom properties via wp-base-styles
Round editor .postbox containers to match WP 7.0 dashboard widgets
